description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, predominantly light gray with faded pink accents, including the laces, eyelets, and sole inserts. The shoe features a mesh and synthetic upper with visible stitching and layered panel construction, providing both breathability and structure. The midsole is thick and robust, with multiple oval-shaped cutouts revealing pink cushioning elements, suggesting enhanced shock absorption. The outsole appears rugged and textured, suitable for urban walking or running, and shows signs of dirt and wear, especially around the toe and heel. A small red Nike Swoosh logo is visible on the outer heel, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The overall appearance indicates the shoe has been well-used, with visible scuffing, discoloration, and creasing throughout.
description: A well-worn light gray and pink athletic sneaker with visible dirt, scuffing, and a red Nike Swoosh logo on the heel. The shoe features a thick, cushioned sole and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered mesh and synthetic upper, pink accents, and prominent Nike Swoosh on the heel.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and visible dirt and wear on the toe cap.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the padded collar, heel structure, and the red Nike Swoosh logo.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the heel, showing the worn midsole and subtle Nike branding.
attribute_logo: Red Nike Swoosh on the outer heel; subtle Nike text on the heel tab
